note: init_experiment baseline. measure.sh fixed: dropped invalid --features stream (no such feature; bench builds under default std/alloc). Loop driven manually via bash/git because autoresearch devices (init/run/log_experiment) are unmounted this session.

name: EXP-1
asi: Removed 2 redundant Bytes refcount bumps per group: the iterator buf.slice(cursor..) in Groups::next/GroupsV2::next, and the intermediate elements slice inside parse_bytes/_v2. Threaded (buf,start) through dispatch_v1/v2/_frames/_seals, parse_kind, parse_frame/_v2, Group::parse, parse_quadlets/_v2. Added offset-aware private parse_bytes_at/_v2_at; public parse_bytes/_v2 kept as offset-0 wrappers so codec.rs (lines 52/53/238/574/904) and the QuadletGroup GroupParser are untouched. nix flake check (clippy/taplo/fuzz) NOT yet run — deferred to finalize.
